title: [Control systems] Siemens security advisory (AV26-689)
description: On July 14, 2026, Siemens published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products. Included were updates for the following products:
products: Desigo CC family V7/V8 - all versions
Desigo CC family V9 - versions prior to V9.0 QU1
IAM Client - multiple versions and models
Opcenter X - versions prior to V2604
Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS on RUGGEDCOM APE1808 - all versions
SIDIS Secured SmartPlug - versions prior to V7.26.0310
SIMATIC S7-1500 CPU family - versions prior to V3.1.6
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
